allow:
Bash(cat > /tmp/button_analysis.txt << 'EOF' # COMPREHENSIVE BUTTON USAGE ANALYSIS FOR ORETECH FRONTEND ## 1. MOST COMMON BUTTON CLASS PATTERNS \(by frequency\) ### Primary Buttons - className="btn-primary" \(112 occurrences\) - Main action buttons - className="btn btn-primary" \(34 occurrences\) - Bootstrap + custom combo ### Secondary/Cancel Buttons - className="btn-close" \(72 occurrences\) - Close/X buttons in modals - className="btn-cancel" \(41 occurrences\) - Cancel buttons in forms/modals - className="btn-secondary" \(26 occurrences\) - Secondary actions - className="btn btn-secondary" \(22 occurrences\) - Bootstrap + custom ### Other Common Variants - className="modal-btn-secondary" \(21 occurrences\) - Modal-specific secondary - className="btn-success" \(12 occurrences\) - Success/confirmations - className="btn-secondary-outline" \(9 occurrences\) - Outlined secondary - className="btn-danger" \(7 occurrences\) - Danger actions \(delete, reject\) - className="btn-save" \(7 occurrences\) - Save-specific buttons ### Utility Buttons - className="retry-btn" \(5 occurrences\) - Retry actions - className="filter-reset-btn" \(5 occurrences\) - Reset/clear filters - className="clear-filters-btn" \(5 occurrences\) - Clear filter button ### Size Variants - className="btn-primary btn-large" \(5 occurrences\) - Large primary button - className="btn-success btn-large" \(5 occurrences\) - Large success button - className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" \(3 occurrences\) - Small primary - className="btn btn-sm btn-success" \(1 occurrence\) - Small success ## 2. BUTTON STATE PATTERNS ### Loading/Disabled State Pattern Pattern: {loading ? <> Text... : 'Default Text'} Examples: ```jsx ``` ### Disabled Pattern - disabled={isLoading} - disabled={isSubmitting} - disabled={isLoading || \(showInput && inputRequired && !inputValue.trim\(\)\)} - disabled={processing} - disabled={currentPage === 1} \(pagination\) - disabled={activeFiltersCount === 0} - disabled={preventCloseWhileLoading && isLoading} ## 3. BUTTON WITH ICON PATTERNS ### Icon + Text Pattern ```jsx ``` ### Icon Buttons - className="btn-icon" \(5 occurrences\) - Icon-only buttons - className="btn-icon edit" - Icon edit button - className="btn-icon delete" - Icon delete button - className="modal-close-btn" \(3 occurrences\) - Close icon button ### Spinner Icon Classes - className="spin" - Rotating spinner for loading - className="spinning" - Alternative spinner class - className="create-loan-spinner" - Custom spinner class ## 4. COMMON BUTTON IMPORT PATTERNS Import statements across codebase: ```jsx import { FaTimes, FaSpinner, FaPlus, FaArrowDown, FaCheck, FaBan } from 'react-icons/fa'; import { FiAlertTriangle, FiCheckCircle, FiXCircle, FiInfo, FiTrash2, FiSend, FiX } from 'react-icons/fi'; import { Activity } from 'react-icons/...' // Dynamic icons ``` ## 5. MODAL FOOTER BUTTON PATTERNS ### Standard Modal Footer ```jsx
``` ### Form Footer \(Alternative Pattern\) ```jsx
``` ## 6. DOMAIN-SPECIFIC BUTTON PATTERNS ### Modal Footer Buttons \(Confirmation Dialog\) - className="btn-secondary2 confirmation-dialog-cancel" - className="btn-primary2 confirmation-dialog-confirm confirmation-dialog-confirm--{type}" ### Table/DataTable Buttons - className="oretech-table__btn oretech-table__btn--secondary" - Table action button - className="oretech-table__pagination-btn" - Pagination button - className="clear-filter-btn" - Clear filters in table header - className="filter-collapse-btn" - Toggle filters ### Finance Domain - className="bank-reconciliation-btn bank-reconciliation-btn-primary" - className="bank-reconciliation-btn bank-reconciliation-btn-secondary" - className="payables-btn payables-btn-primary" - className="payables-btn payables-btn-secondary" - className="loan-details-btn loan-details-btn-primary" - className="loan-details-btn loan-details-btn-secondary" - className="loan-details-btn loan-details-btn-danger" ### Equipment/Maintenance Domain - className="sarky-modal-action-btn sarky-modal-view-btn" - className="sarky-modal-action-btn sarky-modal-delete-btn" - className="driver-modal-unassign-btn" - className="transaction-hub-refresh-btn" - className="transaction-processor-btn primary" - className="transaction-processor-btn secondary" ### Procurement Domain - className="quick-actions-btn primary" - className="quick-actions-remove-btn" - className="disposal-management__btn disposal-management__btn--primary" - className="disposal-management__btn disposal-management__btn--secondary" ### HR Domain - className="action-btn" - Generic action button - className="action-btn-small toggle" - Small toggle action - className="action-btn-small delete" - Small delete action ## 7. CLOSE BUTTON PATTERNS ### Modal Close Button Variations ```jsx // Pattern 1: Icon-only close // Pattern 2: Confirmation dialog close // Pattern 3: Merged classes // Pattern 4: Generic close button // Pattern 5: Back button ``` ## 8. FORM ACTION BUTTONS ### Submit Pattern ```jsx ``` ### Cancel Pattern ```jsx ``` ### Edit Modal Action Button ```jsx ``` ## 9. APPROVAL/REJECTION BUTTONS \(Multi-action pattern\) ```jsx ``` ## 10. BUTTON WITH CONDITIONAL CLASSES ```jsx ``` ## 11. BUTTON ATTRIBUTE PATTERNS ### Type Attribute - type="button" - Standard button \(most common\) - type="submit" - Submit buttons in forms \(explicit\) - Default \(no type\) - Treated as button in React ### onClick Handlers - onClick={handleClose} - onClick={handleSubmit} - onClick={\(\) => navigate\(-1\)} - onClick={handleCancel} - onClick={\(\) => setShowModal\(false\)} - onClick={\(\) => handleAction\('approve'\)} - onClick={fetchDashboardData} ### Accessibility - aria-label="Close dialog" - title={condition ? 'Tooltip text' : ''} - disabled={condition} ## 12. PAGE HEADER / ACTION BUTTONS ```jsx ``` ## 13. UNIFIED BUTTON VARIANTS ACROSS CODEBASE Primary Variants: - btn-primary \(main action\) - btn-secondary \(secondary action\) - btn-success \(confirm/success\) - btn-danger \(delete/danger\) - btn-secondary-outline \(outlined secondary\) State Variants: - Large: btn-primary btn-large - Small: btn-sm, action-btn-small - Outline: btn-secondary-outline, btn-primary--outline Domain-Specific \(Custom\): - Domain prefix + variant: {domain}-btn {domain}-btn-primary - Example: bank-reconciliation-btn bank-reconciliation-btn-primary ## SUMMARY STATISTICS Total unique className patterns: ~100+ Most common base classes: btn-primary, btn-close, btn-cancel, btn-secondary Loading spinner class: spin, spinning Icon patterns: icon + text, icon-only, loading state with icon Average buttons per modal: 2-3 Typical form actions: Cancel + Save/Submit Typical modal footer: Cancel + Confirm EOF cat /tmp/button_analysis.txt)
